markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define playbooks and processes to counter churn and add customer value.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Proactive Value-Add:** To counter churn, EMs must proactively deliver value beyond content creation. This includes regular site health audits (SEMrush), competitive analysis (Check That), and strategic insights on AI/SEO trends.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3915.0)
  - [**Systematize the "How":** The team has the "what" (best practices) but lacks the "how" (step-by-step processes). The immediate priority is creating explicit playbooks for these proactive motions.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3227.0)
  - [**Anchor on Performance:** All conversations must be anchored to performance metrics and the long-term, compounding growth narrative. This reframes the relationship from a content vendor to a strategic partner.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [**Enforce Sprint Handoffs:** New clients must have tracking instrumentation in place before graduating from the Sprint phase. This eliminates a major blocker to proving value.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)

## Topics

### The Churn Problem & Market Pressures

  - [Recent churn is driven by market panic and budget pressures, causing clients to shift focus to short-term wins (e.g., paid search) and question our value vs. cheaper agencies.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [This threat is amplified when our role is perceived as just "blog creators," making us vulnerable to price comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [**Goal:** Onboard 3 clients/week to offset churn and prevent a down quarter.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)

### The Core Narrative: Compounding Growth Engine

  - [Our value is a compounding growth engine built on the website, not just content output.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [**Key levers:**](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
      - [**Website as Destination:** The primary, controllable asset for AI/search visibility and transactions.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
      - [**Predictable Funnel:** Visibility → Traffic → Engagement → Conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
      - [**Value Signals:** Conversions include lead de-anonymization (e.g., DataGrid's success with Procore).](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [**Critical Insight:** The long-term growth curve looks great, but short-term results can be flat. We must manage expectations by showing both timelines.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)

### The "How": Systematizing Proactive Value

  - [The team needs explicit playbooks for proactive value-add motions.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3915.0)
  - [**1. Competitive Analysis (Check That):**](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2045.0)
      - [**Action:** Use Check That to run competitor audits (e.g., Outreach.io vs. Rebel).](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2045.0)
      - [**Why:** Proactively identifies threats and opportunities, demonstrating strategic partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2045.0)
  - [**2. Site Health Audits (SEMrush):**](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=4123.0)
      - [**Action:** Run weekly SEMrush site health audits to find and fix issues (e.g., broken links, duplicate meta descriptions).](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=4123.0)
      - [**Why:** Builds trust by catching problems before the client does.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=4002.0)
  - [**3. Strategic Insights:**](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=4367.0)
      - [**Action:** Advise on market trends (AI search, PSEO) to make clients internal heroes.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)
      - [**Boundary:** Advise on opportunities (e.g., CRO), but only execute after internal review and a formal scope change.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=4380.0)

### Case Study: Augment Account

  - [**Context:** Augment's overall traffic is declining due to intense competition (Cognition, Cursor).](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3558.0)
  - **Our Performance:** Initial growth was strong (0 → 1,900 clicks/week in \<3 months), but then plateaued for 6 months.
  - [**The Missed Opportunity:** The team continued publishing guides blindly instead of enriching existing pages, building topical authority, or cross-linking. This static approach caused traffic to decline.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3725.0)
  - [**The Fix:** Jason's team intervened to enrich pages and build topical clusters, which is now driving a traffic recovery.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3766.0)
  - [**The Lesson:** Proactive intervention during a plateau is critical. The weekly agenda lacked performance metrics, which is a major churn risk.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=4910.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ella:**](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=5332.0)
      - [Work with Jason to create a playbook for competitive analysis using Check That.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3944.0)
      - [Draft a playbook for proactive site health audits using SEMrush.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=4326.0)
  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3066.0)
      - [Document the "how-to" details for the proactive motions discussed.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3066.0)
  - [**Andi:**](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=5346.0)
      - [Reinforce with the team the need to communicate proactive work and performance metrics in all client updates.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=5346.0)
  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=4100.0)
      - [Continue the sprint with Brad to fix bugs and fully enable the "Pages and Analytics" feature in the OS.](https://fathom.video/share/D7z3bzTTKJCiBTF8sYLa5jHGDLwxJQvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=4100.0)
